name: Rajesh kumar
headline: Aspiring Data Analyst | SQL | Power BI | Advanced Excel | Python | Business Intelligence
career_goal: Data Analyst skilled in utilizing SQL, Power BI, Python, and Advanced Excel to support data-driven decision-making. Proficient in data cleaning, KPI reporting, and dashboard development, with a track record of converting raw data into actionable insights. Demonstrated expertise in end-to-end analytics projects, including the AdventureWorks Business Intelligence Dashboard, Olist E-commerce Analytics, and an AI Data Analyst Copilot. Adept at delivering high-impact Business Intelligence solutions through statistical analysis and visualization to address complex business challenges.
responsibilities: Collected, cleaned, validated, and analyzed operational data using SQL and Advanced Excel to generate accurate business reports and MIS dashboards. • Developed automated reporting solutions using Pivot Tables, Power Query, and advanced Excel functions to improve reporting efficiency. • Created Power BI dashboards to monitor KPIs, operational performance, deployment progress, and business metrics. • Wrote SQL queries for data extraction, validation, reconciliation, and reporting across relational databases. • Collaborated with business stakeholders to gather reporting requirements and deliver actionable insights for operational decision-making.
achievements: • Improved reporting accuracy by implementing structured data validation and reconciliation processes. • Built automated reporting workflows that reduced manual reporting effort and improved report consistency. • Developed interactive Power BI dashboards that enhanced KPI visibility and operational monitoring for management teams. • Trained 1,000+ end users on reporting processes, dashboard usage, and application workflows.
responsibilities_2: • Prepared daily, weekly, and monthly operational reports and KPI summaries for management review. • Performed SQL-based data validation, reconciliation, and quality checks to ensure accurate reporting. • Assisted in dashboard preparation and business reporting using Power BI and Advanced Excel. • Coordinated with operational teams to resolve reporting inconsistencies and improve data accuracy.
achievements_2: • Successfully completed verification of 100,000+ operational records within strict timelines. • Received cash awards from Delhi Police for timely completion of high-priority operational projects. • Improved reporting consistency through standardized validation and reconciliation practices.
project_tech_1: Python | Streamlit | OpenRouter AI | JSON | python-docx | Regex
project_description_1: Developed an AI-powered Career Copilot to automate resume generation, ATS score analysis, JD matching, and resume optimization for aspiring Data Analysts. Integrated OpenRouter AI API to provide intelligent resume improvements and implemented profile management, DOCX export, and ATS scoring using Python, Streamlit, and JSON. Designed the application to reduce manual resume customization and streamline the job application process.
project_tech_2: Power BI | SQL | DAX | Power Query | Excel
project_description_2: Built an interactive Business Intelligence dashboard using the AdventureWorks dataset to analyze sales performance, customer behavior, product profitability, and regional trends. Developed KPI dashboards, DAX measures, and Power Query transformations to monitor revenue, profit, customer segmentation, and sales performance. Delivered actionable insights to support executive decision-making through interactive visualizations.
project_description_3: Performed end-to-end exploratory data analysis on the Olist E-commerce dataset using SQL and Power BI. Analyzed customer purchasing behavior, sales trends, payment methods, delivery performance, and product categories to identify key business insights. Created optimized SQL queries and interactive dashboards that supported data-driven business decisions and performance monitoring.
certifications:
• Prompt Engineering – Great Learning
• Prompt Engineering for ChatGPT – Simplilearn SkillUp
languages: Hindi – Native Proficiency,  English – Professional Working Proficiency
preferred_role: Data Analyst, Business Intelligence Analyst, MIS Analyst, Reporting Analyst, Power BI Developer (Junior)
preferred_location: Delhi NCR, Noida, Gurugram ,Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune ,Remote, Hybrid
